theme_description: Ship documentation your users will actually read—clear information architecture, instant search, and AI-ready Q&A out of the box. Turn your knowledge base into polished product docs without hand-rolling a separate doc site.

groups.home_config_info_default: Choose one: ① Set “Site page shown on home” at /; ② Leave empty to use the Classic layout default home below (gradient hero, channel cards, etc.).
groups.home_config_info_card: Choose one: ① Set “Site page shown on home” to display that page at /; ② Leave empty to use the Card docs layout default home fields below (hero, hot keywords, quick guide, etc.). Pages can join Quick guide via page settings.
groups.home_config_info_tree: Choose one: ① Set “Site page shown on home” at /; ② Leave empty to use the Tree docs layout default home below (hero, quick guide cards, recommended list, help banner).

home_page_path.label: Site page shown on home
home_page_path.info: Site page path, e.g. /docs/getting-started, /guide/overview. Shows that page’s title and body at / while the URL stays /. If empty, uses the default home fields below (Card docs layout / Classic layout).

search_hot_keywords.label: Popular Searches
search_hot_keywords.info: For the Card docs layout home search area and the site-wide search modal. Use line breaks for multiple keywords shown below the search box.

links_html.label: Custom link list HTML (left sidebar)
links_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited Tailwind CSS styles

default.name: Classic layout
default.description: Familiar layout with a gentle gradient hero and a 3-column getting-started grid—the safest default for product docs.

left_sidebar_width.info: Classic layout left rail includes channel nav; recommended 400px

home_hero_description.label: Home subtitle / lead
home_hero_description.default: Search, browse channels, or ask AI to find guides and API docs quickly.

home_show_guide_section.label: Show getting-started cards (up to 3 home sub-channels)

home_help_description.label: Footer help description
home_help_description.default: Can't find the doc you need? Send feedback to help us improve the knowledge base.

tree.name: Tree docs layout
tree.description: Tree docs layout: homepage with hero title, quick-guide cards, recommended list, and bottom feedback banner; AI sidebar and search modal match other layouts.

search_hot_keywords.default:
Getting started
FAQ
Configuration
Beginner guide

home_hero_description.label: Home subtitle / lead
home_hero_description.default: Find system configuration, standards, industry norms, and core technical references in one place.

home_help_description.label: Help section description
home_help_description.default: Found a gap, unclear wording, or an idea for new docs? Send feedback anytime.

card.name: Card docs layout
card.description: Card docs layout: left sidebar with logo, search, and grouped site navigation; document body with eyebrow, Copy, and in-page TOC; AI sidebar and search modal match other layouts.

left_sidebar_width.info: Card layout sidebar is narrower; recommended 280px

home_hero_description.label: Home description
home_hero_description.default: Your team’s knowledge hub—browse standards, API guides, and best practices to ship faster.

home_help_description.label: Help section description
home_help_description.default: Spot a gap, unclear wording, or an idea for new docs? Send feedback—we’ll improve the knowledge base together.

show_list.label: Show Sub-page List
show_list.info: If checked, the sub-page list will be displayed on the page

show_on_home_guide.label: Show on homepage quick guide
show_on_home_guide.info: When checked, appears in Card docs layout default home Quick guide cards (up to 3, when home path is empty). If none are selected, pages are chosen by visit count.

title.label: Page Title
title.info: Synced from knowledge base, not editable

icon.label: Page Icon
icon.info: Used to display page icon, recommended 1:1 ratio

content.label: Page Content
content.info: Synced from data source, not editable

logo_url.label: Logo Image
logo_url.info: If logo is set, it will be displayed in header, otherwise: website icon + site name

company_name.label: Company Name
company_name.info: Displayed in footer position at bottom of page

ai_search_completed_text.label: AI Completion Text
ai_search_completed_text.info: Add a sentence after AI completes the answer

feedback_helper_text.label: Page feedback helper prompts
feedback_helper_text.info: JSON: yes / no each with label (button text), title, items
feedback_helper_text.default: {"yes":{"label":"Yes","title":"Great! What worked best for you?","items":["The guide worked as expected.","I easily found the information I needed.","The product and its features were easy to understand.","The documentation is up to date."]},"no":{"label":"No","title":"How can we improve?","items":["Help me get started faster.","Make it easier to find what I need.","Help users understand the product and its features.","Update this documentation."]}}

site_font_preset.label: Site font
site_font_preset.info: Choose a font preset for body text and article content. Code blocks keep monospace fonts.

head_html.label: Custom HTML in <head></head> tags
head_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
head_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert analytics, customer service bot, etc.

header_menu_html.label: Insert HTML code in top navigation area
header_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
header_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert navigation links to company's other websites

footer_menu_html.label: Insert HTML code in bottom area (inside footer, footer_menu_html)
footer_menu_html.info: Supports HTML tags and limited TailwindCSS style code
footer_menu_html.placeholder: Usually used to insert external navigation links, friendly links, SEO optimization links to company's other websites

weixin_app_id.label: Developer ID (AppID)
weixin_app_id.info: WeChat official account/setting and development/development interface management

weixin_app_secret.label: Developer Password (AppSecret)
weixin_app_secret.info: Obtain from WeChat Official Account / Settings & Development / Development Interface Management

weixin_enabled.label: Do you want to enable WeChat sharing
weixin_enabled.info:
Provide the ability to share site pages on WeChat
Please configure the IP whitelist (ip: ${service_ip}) in the WeChat official account. After configuration, there will be a period of delay in effectiveness.
Check whether WeChat sharing permission is enabled, WeChat official account/setting and development/development interface management:

weixin_debug.label: Do you want to enable debug prompt
weixin_debug.info: Please only enable this option during the configuration phase; If WeChat sharing is not configured correctly when accessing the front-end site after activation, an error message will be automatically prompted
